steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The verb “cite” is the key: it signals we need a noun for people presenting evidence for the approach.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Proponents are people who advocate for something—they fit perfectly as the group citing benefits to support a position. Components, Safeguards, and Epitomes are either not people or don't express advocacy. That matches choice C — C is correct.
